title: geum japonicum var. iyoanum
intro: Geum japonicum var. iyoanum, also known as Japanese Avens, is a perennial plant native to East Asia that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve constipation, and reduce inflammation. The plant contains a number of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its potential health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and enhanced immune function. Geum japonicum var. iyoanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies.
